description: A dramatically lit scene showing a young woman in a white blouse and colorful striped skirt kneeling at the feet of a standing male warrior. She grasps his arms or hands in a gesture of supplication, looking up at him imploringly. The man wears a traditional Caucasian outfit with a fur hat and cartridge-bearing chest piece. He stands rigidly, looking down at her. A doorway at left admits a sliver of daylight into the otherwise dark interior. A round object, possibly a tambourine, lies on the floor. The painting uses strong chiaroscuro with most of the scene in deep shadow.
